creator: ota@j.email.ne.jp
text:
www/tomcat41 instead of jakarta-tomcat4 and www/tomcat55 instead of jakarta-tomcat5 exist with newer versions of the same software.

The jakarta-tomcat ports are obsolete by now.

Fix: 

Remove from CVS.
How-To-Repeat: %ls -d /usr/ports/*/*tomcat*
/usr/ports/java/eclipse-sysdeo-tomcat   /usr/ports/www/tomcat41
/usr/ports/www/jakarta-tomcat4          /usr/ports/www/tomcat55
/usr/ports/www/jakarta-tomcat5          /usr/ports/www/tomcat6
/usr/ports/www/tomcat-native
